title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Alex Imas and Phil Trammell discuss the economics of AGI, including how wealth gains from AI might be distributed, whether inequality will accelerate, and how taxation and policy should address these outcomes. The discussion explores counterintuitive economic dynamics that may determine AI's share of future economic value and how non-AI-developing nations can participate in those gains.
